item.title: 18 Book Censorship Posts to Revisit: Book Censorship News, February 27, 2026
item.description: Catch up with five years of censorship writing, ranging from how to fight book bans to the growth of unprofessional book reviews.

item.title: The Most Read Books on Goodreads in February
item.description: Here are the most read books on Goodreads this month! These are the buzziest books of the moment, from Wuthering Heights to Heated Rivalry.

item.title: All the Award Nominees, Plus More News For Library Workers
item.description: Catch up with the latest in publishing news, in upcoming book releases, and a whole host of excellent book lists.

item.title: Black Horror Novels Coming Out in 2026
item.description: Fill your shelves and your TBR with some upcoming Black horror.

item.title: Thinking Beyond Bookmarks: How to Promote Your Comic
item.description: The clever way in which Daniel Nayeri and Alexandra Davis promoted their comic–and why creativity matters in reaching readers.
